nodes.name: EN
nodes.summary: EN表示 IUCN 濒危等级，当前关联384种鸟类，如朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭、黑脸琵鹭等384种鸟类。

nodes.name: 照葉林
nodes.summary: 照葉林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联5种鸟类，包括Trocaz pigeon、波氏鸽、飯島柳鶯等5种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Trocaz pigeon
nodes.summary: Trocaz pigeon（Trocaz pigeon，学名 Columba trocaz），分类上属于鸽形目，并归入鸠鸽科，在图谱中标记为濒危（EN）物种，主要分布于照葉林，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、猎捕压力、非法猎捕。

nodes.name: 猎捕压力
nodes.summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

nodes.name: 鸠鸽科
nodes.summary: 鸠鸽科（Columbidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联299种鸟类，如Purple-winged ground dove、Moreno's ground dove、Black-winged ground dove等299种鸟类。

nodes.name: 非法猎捕
nodes.summary: 直接捕杀或非法贸易导致种群下降。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 鸽形目
nodes.summary: 鸽形目（Columbiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联299种鸟类，如Purple-winged ground dove、Moreno's ground dove、Black-winged ground dove等299种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It mainly occurs on the northern slopes of the mountains, but smaller numbers are found in the south where suitable patches of laurel forest remain. The natural habitat is tall laurisilva forest or dense tree heaths which are cloud-covered for much of the year.Snow (1998) p

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The major cause of its population decline was habitat loss from forest clearance, but hunting and nest predation by introduced rats were also contributory factors

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The major cause of its population decline was habitat loss from forest clearance, but hunting and nest predation by introduced rats were also contributory factors

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Some illegal hunting and poisoning continues because of the damage this pigeon can do to crops, and the government allowed a cull in 2004

links.label: 属于
links.evidence: Wikidata 分类: Trocaz pigeon 属于目 鸽形目。

links.label: 属于
links.evidence: Wikidata 分类: Trocaz pigeon 属于科 鸠鸽科。

links.label: 属于目
links.evidence: 依据 birds.csv 中的 order / order_cn 与 family / family_cn 字段补充。

links.label: 属于科
